itinerary.title: Vietnam Adventure Expedition
itinerary.overview:
Northern Wilderness • Sapa Trekking • Halong Bay Expedition • Off-Road Exploration 06 Nights / 07 Days High-Octane Vietnam Adventure Expedition SERIAL CODE: VN-008 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-VNM-ADV-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: Vietnam CATEGORY: Premium Vietnam Adventure Tour Package DURATION: 06 Nights / 07 Days Hanoi, Sapa & Northern Highlands

TOUR OVERVIEW
Push your boundaries with our TRAGUIN curated Vietnam Adventure Expedition. Designed for true thrill- seekers, this itinerary plunges into the northern wilderness, featuring rugged mountain trekking in Sapa, off- road exploration through remote landscapes, and intensive nature discovery, ensuring unforgettable memories in Vietnam's untamed heart. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 06 Nights / 07 Days Vietnam package (VN-008 / TRG-VNM-ADV-2026): Northern Wilderness • Sapa Trekking • Halong Bay Expedition • Off-Road Exploration with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

days.title: ARRIVAL IN HANOI & BRIEFING
days.description: Arrive in Hanoi. Expedition gear check and briefing. Private transfer to your wilderness-ready lodge.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: JOURNEY TO SAPA HIGHLANDS
days.description: Drive to the Sapa highlands. Immerse yourself in the mountainous terrain, preparing for your multi-day rugged adventure. TRAGUIN Adventure
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: SAPA MOUNTAIN TREKKING
days.description: Intensive guided trek through remote Sapa trails. Experience local tribal life and breathtaking high-altitude vistas.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: WILDERNESS OFF-ROAD EXPLORATION
days.description: Engage in an exclusive experience of off-road vehicle exploration through remote northern valleys, a highlight for serious adventure lovers.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: HALONG BAY ADVENTURE
days.description: Transfer to Halong Bay. Kayak through hidden sea caves and explore remote islands on a premium adventure cruise vessel.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: EXTREME MARINE ACTIVITIES
days.description: A full day of intense marine exploration, from swimming in hidden bays to cliff-side discovery. Celebrating with a celebratory adventure dinner gala.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer, completing your high-octane Vietnam adventure. activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.
